cnExclusive.label: CN exclusive
cnExclusive.calendarDescription: This calendar only covers the CN server. JP, EN, and TW servers are not supported here.
cnExclusive.eventtrackerDescription: This event tracker only supports CN server rankings and prediction data. JP, EN, and TW servers are not supported here.
cnExclusive.gameProfileBindingDescription: UID binding and automatic profile sync only support the CN server. JP, EN, and TW servers are not supported here.
